subcodes.first_line: Upon thee be the Glory of God, and whatsoever befitteth the heaven of His grace, the clouds of His munificence, and the ocean of His favors that hath encompassed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: علیک بهاء الله و ما ینبغی لسماء فضله و سحاب جوده و بحر الطافه الذی احاط
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
